mapper.sql: SELECT p.id AS id, p.title AS title, p.slug AS slug, p.summary AS summary, p.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, p.status AS status, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.bookmark_count AS bookmarkCount, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, c.slug AS categorySlug, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.name ORDER BY t.name SEPARATOR ',') AS tagsCsv, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM posts p LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN post_tags pt ON pt.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id
mapper.select: WHERE p.status = 'PUBLIC' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( MATCH(p.title, p.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) OR p.id IN (SELECT pt3.post_id FROM post_tags pt3 JOIN tags t3 ON t3.id = pt3.tag_id WHERE t3.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ) GROUP BY p.id, c.name, c.slug ORDER BY MATCH(p.title, p.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM posts p WHERE p.status = 'PUBLIC' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( MATCH(p.title, p.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) OR p.id IN (SELECT pt3.post_id FROM post_tags pt3 JOIN tags t3 ON t3.id = pt3.tag_id WHERE t3.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )

SELECT p.id AS id, p.title AS title, p.slug AS slug, p.summary AS summary, p.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, p.status AS status, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.bookmark_count AS bookmarkCount, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, c.slug AS categorySlug, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.name ORDER BY t.name SEPARATOR ',') AS tagsCsv, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM post_bookmarks b JOIN posts p ON p.id = b.post_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN post_tags pt ON pt.post_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY p.id, c.name, c.slug, b.created_at ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_bookmarks b JOIN posts p ON p.id = b.post_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
